title: Superpowers Skill Driven Development
competency: 02. Spec Framing - Requirements decomposition and testable spec creation
mission: Use agent skills to turn a vague feature request into a well-planned engineering implementation.
domain: Team collaboration workspace with roles, workspace membership, invitation policy questions, and no implemented invitation workflow.
outcome: The learner installs Superpowers skills, uses them to investigate and plan, then implements team invitation functionality safely with evidence.
seededDefects: The request does not define who can invite users.
Invitation expiry, rejection, and duplicate-email behavior are unspecified.
Roles exist in the codebase but are not connected to invitation policy.
There is no implementation plan or skill workflow evidence.
verificationGates: implementation-plan.md explains assumptions, small changes, and verification.
Team invitation behavior is implemented safely.
The final result is verified with project checks.
agentWorkflow: Use the skills to explore code before coding.
Plan role, expiry, rejection, and failure scenarios.
